zh.Winchester, Frederick, Virginia, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克維古姆
zh.Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial Am: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克
zh.North Carolina, British Colonial America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州
zh.lifeSummary: Mary Bigelow於1695年3月10日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州。她於1705年與William John Diffee在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她於1780年登記服兵役。她去世於1752年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克享年57歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克維古姆。

zh-hans.Winchester, Frederick, Virginia, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克維古姆

zh-hans.North Carolina, British Colonial America: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Bigelow于1695年3月10日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州。她于1705年与William John Diffee在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她于1780年登记服兵役。她去世于1752年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克享年57岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克維古姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bigelow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English or Irish: perhaps a variant of English   Bigley   or Irish   Begley  .

variants.name: Biglow
meanings: English or Irish: variant of   Bigelow  .

variants.name: Bigley
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Bickley   or   Beckley  , with voicing of /k/ to /g/.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

historicEvents.title: The Tuscarora War
historicEvents.description: The British, Dutch, and German settlers fought with the Tuscarora Native Americans, from September 22, 1711- February 11, 1715, in North Carolina.
North Carolina is the location of Cape Hatteras, sometimes called the Graveyard of the Atlantic- many shipwrecks have occurred nearby.

historicEvents.title: Becomes a Royal Colony
historicEvents.description: July 25, 1729, North Carolina became a royal colony, when the colony was sold to King George II.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Anchor-Carolina Becomes North and South Carolina

en.lifeSummary: Mary Bigelow was born on 10 March 1695, in North Carolina, British Colonial America. She married William John Diffee in 1705, in North Carolina, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She registered for military service in 1780. She died in 1752, in Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 57, and was buried in Winchester, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.North Carolina, British Colonial America: Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Mary Bigelow est née le 10 mars 1695, à Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique. Elle a épousé William John Diffee en 1705, à Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1780. Elle est décédée en 1752, à Frederick, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Winchester, Frederick, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.Winchester, Frederick, Virginia, British: Winchester, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Mary Bigelow wurde am 10. März 1695 in North Carolina, British Colonial America geboren. Sie hat 1705 in North Carolina, British Colonial America William John Diffee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie hat sich 1780 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Sie starb 1752 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Winchester, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Bigelow è nata il il 10 marzo 1695 nel Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America. Lei sposato William John Diffee nel 1705, nel Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Lei arruolato nell'esercito nel 1780. ja.North Carolina, British Colonial America: イギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州
ja.lifeSummary: Mary Bigelowは1695年3月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州で生まれた。1705年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州でWilliam John Diffeeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1780年に兵役登録をした。彼女は1752年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州フレデリックで57歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州フレデリックウィンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Winchester, Frederick, Virginia, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프레더릭크 윈체스터
ko.Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial Am: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프레더릭크
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Bigelow(은)는 1695년 3월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1705년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 William John Diffee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1780년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그녀는 1752년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프레더릭크에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프레더릭크 윈체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.North Carolina, British Colonial America: Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America
pt.lifeSummary: Mary Bigelow nasceu em 10 de março de 1695, em Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America. Ela casou-se com William John Diffee em 1705, em Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela alistou-se no serviço militar em 1780. Ela faleceu em 1752, em Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Winchester, Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.Winchester, Frederick, Virginia, British: винчестир, фредирикк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Mary Bigelow родилась 10 марта 1695 г. в местности Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William John Diffee в 1705 г. в местности Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1780 году она поступила на военную службу. Она умерла в 1752 г. в местности фредирикк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности винчестир, фредирикк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.
